# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what changes and why. Link related issue with "Fixes #N" if applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-visible changes)
